sections.description: Reference documentation for lil-olt-metrics. Contains comprehensive guides for system architecture, configuration, and API specifications.
sections.purpose: Provide technical documentation for developers, operators, and integrators. Covers system design, OTLP ingestion protocol, Prometheus query API, and configuration schema.
sections.functionality: Architecture documentation: System design, data flow, OTLP-to-Prometheus translation, storage architecture, package structure, concurrency model, startup/shutdown sequences, resource footprints. Configuration documentation: YAML config schema, environment variable overrides, all settings with defaults, examples for different deployment patterns. OTLP standard reference: Proto package structure, gRPC and HTTP transports, data hierarchy, metric types (Gauge, Sum, Histogram, ExponentialHistogram, Summary), data point structures, implementation phases. Prometheus API reference: HTTP endpoints for instant/range queries, metadata queries, PromQL language reference, result data types, histogram exposition format, implementation phases.
sections.strengths: Comprehensive coverage of both ingestion (OTLP) and query (Prometheus) specifications. Architecture documentation includes data flow diagrams, concurrency model, and resource footprint targets. Configuration is fully documented with YAML examples, environment variable overrides, and multiple deployment patterns. Well-organized with clear sections, tables, protobuf examples, and JSON wire format examples.
sections.weaknesses: Documentation is static and may drift from implementation as code evolves. Some advanced topics (delta-to-cumulative conversion, compaction algorithm details) are briefly mentioned but not fully detailed. No troubleshooting or common error scenarios documented.
sections.test_coverage: Not applicable - documentation directory. Content should be validated against actual code implementation and tested through integration tests.
sections.dependencies: Documentation references: OTLP protos (`go.opentelemetry.io/proto-otlp`), Prometheus library (`github.com/prometheus/prometheus`), gRPC server, configuration package (`internal/config`), storage backends (FS, Prometheus remote, VictoriaMetrics), ingestion and query packages.
sections.files: architecture.md (245 lines) - System design, data flow, translation rules, storage architecture, package dependencies, concurrency model, startup/shutdown sequences. config.md (283 lines) - Configuration schema with YAML structure, environment variable overrides, examples for different deployment patterns, Go struct definitions. config-reference.md (183 lines) - Detailed field-by-field reference for all configuration options with types, defaults, environment variables. otlp-standard.md (412 lines) - OTLP v1 specification reference covering proto packages, gRPC/HTTP transports, metric data model, metric types, data points, exemplars, implementation phases, JSON examples. prometheus-api.md (375 lines) - Prometheus HTTP API reference with query endpoints, result types, metadata endpoints, PromQL language reference, metrics exposition format, implementation phases. .context.md - Previous context file (may be stale).
